headline: What to Expect From Public Service Enterprise’s Q1 2026 Earnings Report
summary: Public Service Enterprise is expected to announce its fiscal first-quarter earnings shortly, and analysts project a low single-digit profit rise.

headline: Is Public Service Enterprise Group (PEG) One of the 15 Utility Stocks with Highest Dividends
summary: Public Service Enterprise Group Incorporated (NYSE:PEG) is included among the 15 Utility Stocks with Highest Dividends. Public Service Enterprise Group Incorporated (NYSE:PEG) is a predominantly regulated energy company that engages in the provision of electric and gas services. On March 23, Morgan Stanley analyst David Arcaro upped the firm’s price target on Public Service Enterprise […]
